scenes.title: Intro
scenes.narration: This is Nexus — a simple, friendly place for your time bank to come together online. Members offer the skills they're happy to share, ask for the help they need, and exchange their time. Let me show you how easy it is to get started.

scenes.title: Profile
scenes.narration: First, your profile. Add a photo and a few words about yourself, then list the things you enjoy doing — a bit of gardening, lifts to appointments, a friendly chat over coffee. This is how your community gets to know you.

scenes.title: Post an offer
scenes.narration: Now let's offer something. Choose 'New listing', pick 'Offer', and describe what you can help with. Give it a clear title, a short description, and post it — and just like that, it's visible to everyone in your time bank.

scenes.title: Post a request
scenes.narration: Need a hand yourself? It works exactly the same way — choose 'Request' instead. Perhaps you'd like help putting up some shelves, or company on a walk. Post it, and a neighbour can offer their time.

scenes.title: Wrap
scenes.narration: Every hour you give earns you a time credit to spend when you need help in return. That's the heart of timebanking — everyone's time is valued equally. Welcome to Nexus.
